name: Border Grill Oaxacan Chocolate Mocha Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F. Grease a 9-inch round cake pan. Line the bottom with parchment or wax paper.
2. In a 2-quart glass bowl, melt chocolate and butter in microwave on High for 1.5 to 2.5 minutes, stirring once or twice until smooth.
3. In a large bowl, beat eggs with an electric mixer until thickened and lemon-colored, about 5-7 minutes. Fold in 1/3 of the eggs into the chocolate mixture. Add remaining eggs and mix well. Stir in espresso powder.
4. Pour batter into prepared pan. Place pan in larger pan filled with water to reach one-third the height of the cake pan. Bake for 5 minutes, then cover with foil and bake an additional 10 minutes. Remove from water bath, uncover, and let cool on a rack for at least 45 minutes. Refrigerate for at least 6 hours or overnight.
5. About an hour before serving, beat heavy cream and powdered sugar in a medium bowl until soft peaks form. Add sour cream and vanilla and beat until smooth and peaks hold shape. Spread over the cooled cake. Arrange pecans around the edge of the cake. Melt remaining chocolate and drizzle over top with a fork in decorative pattern. Serve chilled.
